title: Students in the Schomburg Center Reading Room
creator: Unknown
description: A group of Black students studying at tables in the Schomburg Center for Research in Black Culture. The room features bookshelves and framed portraits on the walls.
source: Schomburg Center for Research in Black Culture

title: The Schomburg Library Opened to Students
creator: National Urban League
description: An article from Opportunity magazine announcing the opening of the Arthur A. Schomburg Collection of Negro Literature and Art at the NYPL 135th Street Branch.

title: Exterior of the 135th Street Branch New York Public Library
creator: Unknown
description: The facade of the New York Public Library building that housed the original Schomburg Collection in Harlem.

title: Exposition des Nègres d'Amérique Exhibit
creator: W.E.B. Du Bois
description: A display of books, charts, and photographs from the 'American Negro' exhibit at the Paris Exposition of 1900.

title: Portrait of Lawrence Dunbar Reddick
creator: Unknown
description: A formal portrait of L.D. Reddick, who served as the second curator of the Schomburg Collection at the New York Public Library.
